ns0:entry.ns0:title: [c#] ed0ard/CS2-Bot-Improver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed0ard/CS2-Bot-Improver
Language: c%23
CS2-Bot-Improver is a plugin for Counter-Strike 2 that improves bots' aim, movement, nade throwing, personalities, strategies, etc. Aims to enhance your experience when playing against bots offline or with friends. It can be installed on both clients and servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] Datalux/Osintgram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Datalux/Osintgram
Language: python
Osintgram is a OSINT tool on Instagram. It offers an interactive shell to perform analysis on Instagram account of any users by its nickname

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [common-lisp] google/lisp-koans
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/lisp-koans
Language: common-lisp
Common Lisp Koans is a language learning exercise in the same vein as the ruby koans, python koans and others. It is a port of the prior koans with some modifications to highlight lisp-specific features. Structured as ordered groups of broken unit tests, the project guides the learner progressively through many Common Lisp language features.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Turn your Android into a GPU-accelerated Linux hacking lab with one command! XFCE Desktop + Nmap, SQLMap, Hydra, Wine & more. No root required.
